name: solo-work
description: One session, fresh worktree — quickest path to a clean Claude instance on a side task.

name: implement-and-test
description: Two Praxion-pipeline sessions: @implementer + @test-engineer, sharing the same task slug via .ai-work/.

sessions.name: implementer
sessions.task: Read .ai-work/<slug>/WIP.md and execute the assigned step. Run tests after.

sessions.name: test-engineer
sessions.task: Read .ai-work/<slug>/WIP.md and the implementer's planned scope. Author matching tests. Run after.

name: team-lead
description: Praxion mini-pipeline fan-out: @researcher / @implementation-planner / @implementer / @verifier on one task slug.

sessions.name: researcher
sessions.task: Explore the codebase area named in CLAUDE.md / WIP.md; emit findings to .ai-work/<slug>/RESEARCH_FINDINGS.md.

sessions.name: implementation-planner
sessions.task: After researcher commits findings, decompose into steps in .ai-work/<slug>/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md.

sessions.name: implementer
sessions.task: Execute one step at a time from WIP.md. Tests must pass before advancing.

sessions.name: verifier
sessions.task: After implementer reports done, run convention-compliance review + acceptance check; emit VERIFICATION_REPORT.md.

name: compare-implementations
description: Three sessions, same task, different worktrees — explore alternative approaches in parallel.

sessions.name: approach-a
sessions.task: Implement the change using approach A (e.g., refactor + small surface).
sessions.system_prompt: You are approach A. Bias toward minimal-surface refactor. Justify each line in the diff.

sessions.name: approach-b
sessions.task: Implement the change using approach B (e.g., new abstraction).
sessions.system_prompt: You are approach B. Bias toward a clean new abstraction. Justify each new module.

sessions.name: approach-c
sessions.task: Implement the change using approach C (e.g., extend existing without refactor).
sessions.system_prompt: You are approach C. Bias toward minimum change to existing code. Justify each insertion site.

name: feature-fan-out
description: Three parallel feature streams on distinct worktrees. Each session owns one named branch.

sessions.name: auth
sessions.task: Pick up the auth feature: read SYSTEMS_PLAN.md + WIP.md, execute the next step.

sessions.name: billing
sessions.task: Pick up the billing feature: read SYSTEMS_PLAN.md + WIP.md, execute the next step.

sessions.name: docs
sessions.task: Pick up the docs pass: read the README + CHANGELOG, surface what's stale.

name: overnight-autonomous
description: @implementer primary + @sentinel watcher under auto-approve. Use only on isolated worktrees with no shared resources.

sessions.name: implementer
sessions.task: Pick up the long-running task from .ai-work/<slug>/WIP.md. Iterate until verifier passes. Stop and surface if uncertain.

sessions.name: sentinel
sessions.task: Periodic ecosystem audit while the implementer runs. Read-only; surface drift to .ai-work/<slug>/LEARNINGS.md.
